result.stdout:
Generates a JavaScript client for a Facility Service Definition.

Usage: fsdgenjs input output [options]

   input
      The path to the input file (- for stdin).
   output
      The path to the output directory or file (- for stdout).

   --module <name>
      The module name used by the generated JavaScript.
   --typescript
      Generates TypeScript.
   --express
      Generates Express service.
   --fastify
      Generates a Fastify plugin. When specified, only the server plugin is generated, not the client. EXPERIMENTAL: This option is subject to change/removal without a major version bump.
   --disable-eslint
      Disables ESLint via code comment.
   --no-http
      Omits generated HTTP client code.
   --file-name-suffix
      Suffix to append to generated file names before the file extension.
   --indent (tab|1|2|3|4|5|6|7|8)
      The indent used in the output: a tab or a number of spaces.
   --newline (auto|lf|crlf)
      The newline used in the output.
   --exclude-tag <tag>
      Excludes service elements with the specified tag.
   --dry-run
      Executes the tool without making changes to the file system.
   --verify
      Exits with error code 1 if changes to the file system are needed.
   --quiet
      Suppresses normal console output.
